_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: Laparoscopic Surgery for Endometriosis (Other than Hysterectomy)
clinical_indications: Failure of medical treatment of endometriosis
Cyclical symptoms in different organs affected with endometriosis like bladder, rectum, lungs, gastrointestinal tract

preauth.label: Detailed clinical notes with history, symptoms, signs, examination findings, indication for procedure, planned line of treatment, advice for admission

claim.label: Photograph of the gross specimen removed (optional)

ppd_preauth.q: Detailed Clinical notes all vitals, detailed history especially medication history, symptoms, signs, physical examination including local examination, indication for procedure, planned line of treatment and advice for admission?
Did the history, clinical examination, and imaging confirm the diagnosis?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and line of treatment?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Was the imaging indicative of surgery?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: History, clinical examination, or imaging not indicative of surgery.
Detailed clinical notes (including history, symptoms, signs, examination findings, indication, planned treatment, admission advice) are incomplete or missing at pre-authorization.
USG Abdomen/pelvis report is missing or inconclusive at pre-authorization.
Detailed Indoor Case Papers (ICPs) with daily vitals and line of treatment are incomplete or missing at claim submission.
Detailed procedure / operative notes are missing or incomplete at claim submission.
Histopathology examination report is missing at claim submission.

additional_information.special_empanelment: Facilities with well-equipped operation theatre, anesthesia equipment and anesthetist
clinical_key_pointers: Endometriosis is the presence of endometrial glands or stroma in sites other than the uterine cavity and is associated with pain and subfertility. Surgical interventions aim to remove visible areas of endometriosis and restore the anatomy.
surgical_options: Aspiration of peritoneal fluid in cul-de-sac
Excision of larger lesions and chocolate cyst
Evaluation findings, patient`s clinical condition, and decision of the surgeon may convert laparoscopy to laparotomy
